sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Circular Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player's ship is restricted to movement along a circumference around the edge of the screen. Ship moves in either direction along this circular path.

special_mechanics.name: Super Phaser Attack
special_mechanics.description: Special attack available in NES/FDS versions that costs energy. Provides additional offensive capability beyond normal guns.

special_mechanics.name: Perspective System
special_mechanics.description: One-point perspective display with vanishing point at screen center. All shots converge at the vanishing point, creating depth illusion as enemies emerge from center and fly outward.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data. No detailed movement physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is a tube shooter (shmup) paradigm, not a platformer, so traditional jump/gravity mechanics do not apply. Focus is on circular perimeter movement and perspective-based gameplay.
